page_metadata.biotools__summary: RuleGO is a web tool for description of gene groups by means of Gene Ontology. The user is able to describe gene groups on the basis of logical rules that include GO-terms in their premises.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RuleGO is a web tool for description of gene groups by means of Gene Ontology. The user is able to describe gene groups on the basis of logical rules that include GO-terms in their premises.
